description_long: This is a modern, freestanding cabinet or shelving unit featuring a combination of wood and white laminate finishes. The structure includes a tall vertical section with open shelving on one side and a closed cabinet on the other, providing both display and concealed storage options. The lower section consists of two large drawers and a flat surface, suitable for placing items or working. The open shelving is divided into several square compartments, ideal for books, decor, or small objects. The cabinet doors and drawers have a minimalist design with no visible handles, contributing to a sleek, contemporary appearance. The unit stands on short black legs, elevating it slightly above the ground and enhancing its urban, functional aesthetic.
description: A modern, freestanding cabinet with wood and white finishes, featuring open shelves, closed cabinets, and drawers on black legs. It combines display and concealed storage in a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The back view shows the plain wooden rear panel and the black legs, with no visible shelves or doors.
description_view_1: The left-side view reveals the open shelving on the right, a closed cabinet on the left, and the drawers below.
description_view_2: The top-down view highlights the flat surfaces and the arrangement of the vertical and horizontal sections.
description_view_3: The right-side view mirrors the left, showing the open shelving on the left, a closed cabinet on the right, and the drawers below.
